instruction: I want to learn python programming and my friend recommends me this course website. I have grabbed the lecture slide for week 0. Please download the PDFs for other weeks into the opened folder and leave the file name as-it-is.

evaluator.eval: compare_archive(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/lecture_slides.zip', 'dest': 'lecture_slides.zip'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/multi_apps/0e5303d4-8820-42f6-b18d-daf7e633de21/lecture_slides.zip', 'dest': 'gold_lecture_slides.zip'}), file_path='lecture_slides', file_type='pdf')
